assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: In version-impact.md, all 7 supported versions show 'No' in the Affected column: 2.1.0 (serde_json 1.0.137), 2.1.1 (1.0.137), 2.2.0 (1.0.138), 2.2.1 (1.0.138), 2.2.2 (1.0.138), 2.2.3 (1.0.139), 2.2.4 (1.0.139). All are >= 1.0.135 fix threshold. Summary states '0 of 7 supported versions are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 7 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, decision header is 'Case C -- No Supported Versions Affected'. Section '1. Transition Issue to Closed' proposes Resolution: 'Not a Bug' with reason: 'The vulnerable component (serde_json < 1.0.135) is not present in any supported product version.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, Section '2. Add Triage Comment' includes a detailed comment listing all 7 versions with their build tags and serde_json versions: '2.1.0 (v0.3.8): serde_json 1.0.137 -- not affected', '2.1.1 (v0.3.12): serde_json 1.0.137 -- not affected', '2.2.0 (v0.4.5): serde_json 1.0.138 -- not affected', etc.

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 7 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, Section '3. Set VEX Justification' proposes setting customfield_12345 (VEX Justification) to 'Component not Present' with reason: 'The vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not present in any supported product version.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 7 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, Section '4. No Remediation Tasks' explicitly states: 'Per Case C procedure, no remediation tasks are created since no supported versions are affected.' No other output files (data-extraction.md, version-impact.md) contain any remediation task creation.
